article_title: Loop Industries Sets Up Recycling Facility in Gujarat

article_title: Loop Industries Sets Up Recycling Facility in Gujarat
question: What will the Loop Industries facility convert into recycled PET resin?

question: What is the expected outcome of the Loop Industries project in India?
